title: Click Ping Wheel
description: Visual ground ping feedback for click-to-move, designed to work with Dungeons Perspective (dungeons_iso).
body:
Description

Click Ping Wheel adds clear visual ground ping feedback for click-to-move gameplay.

Designed specifically to work with Dungeons Perspective (dungeons_iso), this mod displays a ground marker, directional arrow, and optional beam effect whenever you click the ground to move. It helps confirm movement commands visually, inspired by ARPG and MOBA-style control feedback.

The mod is fully client-side and does not change any gameplay mechanics.
All visual elements — including colors, sizes, and effects — can be configured directly in-game via Mod Menu.

Features

-Visual ground ping for click-to-move

-Ring, arrow, and optional beam effects

-In-game configuration (colors, size, duration)

-Client-side only

-Designed for use with Dungeons Perspective

Requirements
-Fabric Loader (1.21.1)

-Fabric API

-Dungeons Perspective (dungeons_iso)

-Mod Menu + Cloth Config (for in-game settings)
